questions.question: Define climate.
questions.answer: Climate refers to the sum total of weather conditions and variations over a large area for a long period of time.

questions.question: What are the elements of weather and climate?
questions.answer: Temperature, atmospheric pressure, wind, humidity and precipitation.

questions.question: What is meant by monsoon?
questions.answer: Monsoon refers to the seasonal reversal of wind direction during a year.

questions.question: Why does India experience a monsoon type of climate?
questions.answer: Because seasonal winds bring rainfall to most parts of the country.

questions.question: How does latitude affect climate?
questions.answer: Latitude determines the amount of solar energy received at a place.

questions.question: What role does altitude play in climate?
questions.answer: Temperature decreases with increase in altitude.

questions.question: What is continentality?
questions.answer: It refers to extreme climate conditions experienced far from the sea.

questions.question: What is Coriolis force?
questions.answer: It is the force caused by the earth’s rotation that deflects winds.

questions.question: Why do coastal areas have moderate climate?
questions.answer: Because the sea moderates temperature.

questions.question: When does the advancing monsoon season begin?
questions.answer: It begins in early June.

questions.question: Name two branches of the southwest monsoon.
questions.answer: Arabian Sea branch and Bay of Bengal branch.

questions.question: What are dust storms?
questions.answer: Strong winds carrying dust that occur during summer.

questions.question: What are mango showers?
questions.answer: Pre-monsoon rains that help ripen mangoes.

questions.question: What are western disturbances?
questions.answer: Cyclonic storms originating in the Mediterranean region.

questions.question: Which season is known as the rainy season in India?
questions.answer: Advancing monsoon season.

questions.question: What is retreating monsoon?
questions.answer: The period when monsoon winds withdraw from India.

questions.question: Which coast receives rainfall from retreating monsoon?
questions.answer: Tamil Nadu coast.

questions.question: Why is rainfall heavy in northeastern India?
questions.answer: Because of monsoon winds and relief features.

questions.question: Which region receives the least rainfall in India?
questions.answer: Western Rajasthan and Ladakh.

questions.question: Why are parts of Rajasthan drought-prone?
questions.answer: Because they receive very little rainfall.

questions.question: What causes floods in the northern plains?
questions.answer: Heavy monsoon rainfall.

questions.question: Why is the monsoon uncertain?
questions.answer: Because its arrival and rainfall distribution vary each year.

questions.question: Why is snowfall common in the Himalayas?
questions.answer: Because temperatures are very low at high altitudes.

questions.question: What is the role of relief in climate?
questions.answer: Mountains act as barriers to winds and influence rainfall.

questions.question: Why is monsoon important for India?
questions.answer: It supports agriculture and water supply.
